WHY BENEBOTS EXIST

The benefits industry is still digging with its hands.

Think about the first person to use a shovel. Everyone around them was digging with their hands — that's how it had always been done. Nobody wanted to try the shovel. Didn't matter how much easier it looked. They just kept digging.

But the shovel guy didn't stop. He dug bigger holes. Better holes. Holes that would have taken everyone else a week, done in an afternoon. And eventually — slowly, reluctantly — the rest of them picked up a shovel too.

AI is the shovel.

Benefits administration today — the stewardship reports built manually in Excel, the open enrollment FAQs answered one by one, the COBRA notices tracked in a spreadsheet — is an entire industry still digging with its hands. Not because shovels don't exist. Because that's the way it's always been done.

That's why the BeneBots exist.

Twenty years watching good HR admins drown in work that didn't need to be manual. Twenty years knowing there was a better way, and building toward it. The BeneBots aren't a product. They're the proof.

Pick up the shovel.

See the BeneBots →
The Guy · Benefits Practice

Meet MyBenefitsGuy.

Human-led benefits consulting — 20 years of expertise, delivered for clients who need it most. Business owners, HR managers, and executives who want real answers, not more jargon.

BUILT BY A 20-YEAR INSIDER

I'm not an AI person who wandered into benefits. I'm a benefits person who found a better tool.

Twenty years in this industry — no college degree, just the work. HR administration, retirement planning, benefits consulting, carrier negotiations. I've been in the room for the hard conversations: the employee who didn't understand their COBRA deadline, the small business owner who didn't know their plan had a compliance gap, the HR admin who spent a full day building a report that should have taken an hour.

I was skeptical about AI in a field where mistakes have real consequences for real people's healthcare. The compliance stakes are real. The trust stakes are real. I get why the industry is cautious.

But I also got tired of watching capable people do exhausting work that didn't need to be manual. So I built the BeneBots — AI workflow agents designed specifically for benefits administration, with human oversight built into every step.

The industry thought the shovel guy was crazy. He was right.

— Ty Mosher, Employee Benefits Account Manager | Founder, Infinite Awesome Studio
Licensed Producer: MD · VA · DC

THE BENEBOTS

What benefits administration looks like when you stop digging manually.

Each BeneBot handles a specific workflow that used to eat hours of your week. Same output. A fraction of the time. Human-reviewed. Compliance-conscious. Ready to work.

"Never sleeps. Never sighs. Knows every plan detail like the back of its hand."

Drop BeneBots into your HR portal and give your team an always-on Benefits Customer Service Guy. Q&A for employees. Coaching through Open Enrollment. Side-by-side plan comparisons. LOA orientation. Stewardship reports for leadership. Five bots. One platform. Every answer grounded in your real plans.
